description: Composition White knitted scarf made of 45% cotton and 55% acrylic, has branding in metallic embelishments on one side of the hem and brand tag on the other side Length: 180cm Wash care only hand wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach Do not iron Celebrate your varied lifestyle with this fabulous scarf from adidas originals and enjoy the choices that come with it. Wrap it around your neck, tie a knot, let it hang loose, or simply wear it like a muffler tucked into your coat to keep out the chill on a wintery day.
